/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -Wno-deprecated-declarations -rdynamic CMakeFiles/pointpillar_rt.dir/main.cpp.o -o pointpillar_rt   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu:/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl -lrt -Wl,--whole-archive libpointpillar_core.a libpointpillar_kernels.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -lnvinfer -lnvonnxparser -lnvinfer_plugin -lcudart -lcublas -lcublasLt -lcurand -ldl -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -lrt /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4 -lnvinfer -lnvonnxparser -lnvinfer_plugin -lcudart -lcublas -lcublasLt -lcurand -ldl -lm
